posts.title: How to Buy Organic Food with Bitcoin
posts.content:
Full article content here...

## Buying Local with Bitcoin

You can now buy fresh organic produce directly from farmers using Bitcoin on Plebeian Market. No intermediaries, just peer-to-peer commerce.

## Getting Started

1. Browse your local farmers
2. Place an order
3. Pay with Bitcoin
4. Enjoy fresh food!

🌾 Did you know? Plebeian Market now has over 50 merchants accepting Bitcoin directly! From farm fresh produce to handmade goods - all peer-to-peer, no middlemen. 🏠⚡

#Bitcoin #Nostr #P2P #Freedom
